theme.rationale: Legal practice management requires ultimate clarity, authority, and truth. Using a high-contrast, strict Swiss layout ensures that complex data (deadlines, billable hours, conflict checks) is easily scannable on mobile screens. The monochrome structure removes distractions, while severe typography creates a highly professional, trustworthy app experience.

headings.usage: Use tight tracking (tracking-tight) for large headers to convey editorial sharpness. Absolutely no Inter, Roboto, or standard UI fonts for headings.

body.usage: Highly legible for dense legal dates, numbers, financial data, and case files.

rules: No gradients. UI must be 95% monochrome.
Color is strictly for functional cues (Alert Red for overdue invoices or urgent hearings today).
Hover/Press states must invert colors or darken significantly.
Do NOT use teal or purple under any circumstances.

spacing_and_layout.padding: Generous spacing. Screen edges must use p-4 or p-6. Container blocks use p-6 or p-8.
spacing_and_layout.border_radius: Sharp or minimal. Max rounded-md (6px) or rounded-none. No pill-shaped buttons unless it's a small functional tag.
spacing_and_layout.surfaces: Cardless design or strict 1px solid borders (border-black/10) with absolutely NO drop shadows.
mobile_patterns: Bottom Tab Navigation for primary routes: Home, Matters, Clients, Billing.
Bottom Sheets for quick entry (Add Note, Track Time, New Client) to keep context.
Use 'Grid Borders' pattern for metric grids (1px borders between items, exposing the skeleton).

buttons.primary: Solid black background, white text, 0px or 4px radius, tracking-wide. Must include hover/active state inversion or opacity shift.
buttons.secondary: Transparent background, 1px black border, black text.
buttons.interaction: Active states scale down slightly (active:scale-95) with opacity change.

cards.dashboard_metric: Flat, 1px border, bold numerical metric (H2), micro uppercase descriptive overline. No shadow.
cards.matter_list_item: Left-aligned, clear typography hierarchy. Case title in H3, client and date in muted small text. Chevron on right for affordance.

inputs.style: Bottom border only (flushed) or rigid square borders. Focus state thickens the border to 2px black (focus:ring-2 focus:ring-black).
inputs.labels: Micro uppercase labels above inputs, strong tracking.

navigation.bottom_tab: Fixed at bottom, monochrome icons, active tab gets a 2px top border highlight (black).
navigation.top_bar: Sticky top, blur background (bg-white/80 backdrop-blur-xl backdrop-saturate-150), 1px solid bottom border (border-black/10).

images.description: Modern architecture courthouse for aesthetic empty states or login background.
Indian professional portrait for client list avatars.
Indian professional portrait for client list avatars.

icons.style: Regular or Bold weight. Clean, unopinionated.
icons.usage_instructions: yarn add @phosphor-icons/react. Use for bottom nav and quick actions.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Minimum 4.5:1 for standard text. Black on white ensures max contrast.
accessibility_and_testing.testing_CRITICAL: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute. Example: data-testid='login-submit-button', data-testid='matter-item-123', data-testid='tab-calendar'.

motion.page_transitions: Slide-in from right for details (standard mobile OS behavior). Bottom sheet slide-up.

instructions_to_main_agent: This is a mobile-first UI built with React.js (.js files, no .tsx). Use Tailwind mobile breakpoints (default classes) as the primary layout. Desktop breakpoints (md, lg) can act as tablet/desktop web views.
Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Stick to Cabinet Grotesk or fallback to a crisp geometric sans if unavailable.
Avoid Shadcn card shadows completely. Override them with flat styles, 1px monochrome borders, and zero shadow.
Rely on Indian legal context in dummy data: 'Saket District Court', '₹45,000', Indian names, GSTIN references.
Ensure all lists (Matters, Clients) are highly scannable. Left-align data. Use generous padding. Implement Conflict of Interest checks logically in the UI.
For the UI architecture, strictly follow the mobile app patterns: Fixed bottom navigation, scrollable content area, and sliding bottom sheets for quick actions.
